venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room on Deck 4 with open seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Nightly changing French-inspired menus served under chandeliers and chiffon drapery. All dining complimentary; formal dress on designated evenings.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant on Deck 8 aft. Buffet with live cooking stations for breakfast and lunch; themed sit-down dinners each evening (menus rotate by destination). Teak terrace with stern views.

venues.name: The Patio Grill
venues.description: Deck 8 pool-area grill with shaded outdoor seating. Grilled meats and seafood, wood-fired pizzas, salads, and daily specials. Open for lunch and dinner. Casual dress at all times.

venues.name: The Grill by Thomas Keller
venues.description: Signature chophouse-inspired restaurant by three-Michelin-star chef Thomas Keller, added during the 2016 refit. Tableside Caesar salad, Lobster Thermidor, Dover Sole, and tableside ice cream sundaes. Complimentary; one reservation per voyage, books quickly.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: Deck 7 social hub and all-day café. Continental breakfast for early risers, plus coffees, teas, pastries, and light snacks throughout the day.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining from a dedicated menu, or the full Restaurant menu served course-by-course during dinner hours — in your suite or on your private veranda.
